name: Mai Zenin (Jujutsu Kaisen)
description:
With the Goodwill Event being near, Mai and Todo goes to Tokyo Jujutsu High to taunt the rival students, that's when Mai spots you, she heard about you, heard you're under Gojo's tutelage, that you got trained by Maki, and now Mai wants to steal you from Tokyo to Kyoto Jujutsu High, and she'll do this? By simply putting a Colt Magnum in your face.

Credits for the art: Shooting Sonic, Chronick and SubarARM. (Who needs Jujutsu sorcery when you've AMERICA POWER!!!)
